brand_identity.name: Rina Visuals
brand_identity.personality: The sophisticated friend who throws the best parties.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. H1 should be massive (text-5xl to text-7xl). H3 (text-2xl) for card titles.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI elements, and navigation.

special.usage: Use VERY sparingly for 'signature' accents or testimonials.

usage_rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use Espresso (#2C2420).
Backgrounds should be Cream (#F9F5F1), not white, to reduce eye strain and add warmth.
Use Muted Gold (#C5A059) for primary buttons and active states.

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-8 to p-24 for section padding.
spacing.grid_gap: gap-8 or gap-12 for portfolio layouts.
spacing.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 for internal card content.

visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-none for images (sharp elegance), rounded-lg for UI inputs.
visual_enhancers.overlays: Warm gradient overlay: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(44,36,32,0.4), transparent)

layout_strategies.hero: Split screen or Full-bleed with 'Parallax' effect. Text must overlap image slightly.
layout_strategies.portfolio: Masonry Grid (Asymmetric). Mix portrait and landscape aspect ratios.
layout_strategies.booking: Step-by-step wizard (Shadcn Form) centered in a clean container.

motion.hover: Images scale 1.05, Grayscale to Color, or Text underline expands.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C5A059] text-white hover:bg-[#B08D4C] rounded-none px-8 py-3 tracking-widest uppercase text-xs font-semibold transition-all
buttons.secondary: border border-[#2C2420] text-[#2C2420] hover:bg-[#2C2420] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-3 tracking-widest uppercase text-xs transition-all

cards.service: bg-white p-8 border border-[#E6DCCA] hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 group cursor-pointer
cards.portfolio: relative overflow-hidden group aspect-[3/4] or aspect-[4/3]

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#8C8582] focus:border-[#C5A059] rounded-none px-0 py-2 focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-[#8C8582]/50

navigation.style: Sticky, glassmorphism with warm tint: bg-[#F9F5F1]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E6DCCA]/50

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Montserrat' from Google Fonts in index.css.
TAILWIND CONFIG: Extend the theme with the colors provided in 'design_system.colors'.
THEME: Force Light Mode default (darkMode: 'class'). This brand is Light/Warm.
NAVIGATION: Create a 'Navbar' component that is sticky and changes style on scroll (transparent to glass).
BOOKING: Use a multi-step form for booking (Date -> Service -> Details -> Payment).
ADMIN: Secure /admin route. Use a table component to manage bookings.
DO NOT use standard Shadcn rounded corners. Override radius to 0 or 0.25rem for a sharper, more premium look.
IMAGES: Use the provided URLs. For missing images, use high-quality Unsplash placeholders with keywords 'wedding', 'event', 'party'.
universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Interactive elements must have hover states.
